Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

(11 comments)

Test failed for ZFS with:

 CMD: shadow-24vm7 /usr/sbin/lr_reader lustre-ost1/ost1
 shadow-24vm7: /usr/sbin/lr_reader: Unable to read old data
 sanity test_252: @@@@@@ FAIL: /usr/sbin/lr_reader failed on target ost1 device lustre-ost1/ost1

For now it is enough to skip the new test for non-ldiskfs devices as well as skip the test for old versions of lr_reader (e.g. if "lr_reader -h" fails to print the "--client" or "--reply" in the usage message).

The directly-mounted file reading functionality can be added in a second patch, along with a separate test for that.

Patch Set 4:

(8 comments)

The patch will first only support ldiskfs targets mounted as Lustre filesystem.

parents.subject: LU-2261 test: Re-enable sanity test 156 for zfs

commit.subject: LU-5319 utils: update lr_reader to display additional data
commit.message:
LU-5319 utils: update lr_reader to display additional data

The lr_reader command currently displays only the server area
of the LAST_RCVD file of a Lustre ldiskfs target device.

This patch enhances the command to allow diplaying :
- the per-client area of the LAST_RCVD file
  when --client or -c option is specified
- the reply data of the REPLY_DATA file
  when --reply or -r option is specified
It still only support ldiskfs target device.

Signed-off-by: Gregoire Pichon <gregoire.pichon@bull.net>
Change-Id: Ifc2b7f9591eef0da5e4a5dc00f37e58484d4ea97
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/14862
Tested-by: Jenkins
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <jian.yu@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
